hooks.command: if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ ! -d memory/episodes ]; then mkdir -p memory/episodes/archive && echo 'Auto-created memory/episodes/ (CLAUDE.md present)'; fi; if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo 'memory/episodes/ exists'; else echo 'NO_MEMORY_DIR'; fi
if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ ! -d memory/episodes ]; then mkdir -p memory/episodes/archive; fi; if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo 'memory/episodes/ exists'; else echo 'NO_MEMORY_DIR'; fi
if [ -f memory/MEMORY.md ]; then echo '--- Memory Index ---'; cat memory/MEMORY.md; echo '---'; fi

if [ -d memory/episodes ]; then echo '--- Episodic memory (post-compaction restore) ---'; cat memory/episodes/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No episodes today yet.'; echo '---'; cat memory/episodes/$(date -v-1d +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || date -d 'yesterday' +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null).md 2>/dev/null || true; fi
